languages.text: {n}В его руках зажат — нет, сросся с пальцами, — черный куб из неественно гладкого черного материала. Среди цикла мучительных метаморфоз это единственный неизменный и недвижимый объект.{/n}

{n}Clutched in his hands — no, fused with his fingers — is a black cube of unnaturally smooth black material. In the endless cycle of excruciating metamorphoses, it is the only object that is unmoving and unchanging.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}В его руках зажат — нет, сросся с пальцами, — черный куб из неественно гладкого черного материала. Среди цикла мучительных метаморфоз это единственный неизменный и недвижимый объект.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Clutched in his hands — no, fused with his fingers — is a black cube of unnaturally smooth black material. In the endless cycle of excruciating metamorphoses, it is the only object that is unmoving and unchanging.{/n}

{n}Clutched in his hands — no, fused with his fingers — is a black cube of unnaturally smooth black material. In the endless cycle of excruciating metamorphoses, it is the only object that is unmoving and unchanging.{/n}

{n}Clutched in his hands — no, fused with his fingers — is a black cube of unnaturally smooth black material. In the endless cycle of excruciating metamorphoses, it is the only object that is unmoving and unchanging.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Apretado entre sus manos (o más bien, fusionado con sus dedos) ves un cubo negro hecho de un material sobrenaturalmente pulido. Se trata del único objeto que permanece inerte e inalterado en el interminable ciclo de metamorfosis agónicas.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Clutched in his hands — no, fused with his fingers — is a black cube of unnaturally smooth black material. In the endless cycle of excruciating metamorphoses, it is the only object that is unmoving and unchanging.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Apretado entre sus manos (o más bien, fusionado con sus dedos) ves un cubo negro hecho de un material sobrenaturalmente pulido. Se trata del único objeto que permanece inerte e inalterado en el interminable ciclo de metamorfosis agónicas.{/n}

languages.text: {n}一个材质异常光滑的黑色立方体正被他紧握在手中，不，是和手指熔在了一起。在那无尽而极度痛苦的变异轮回中，这是唯一静止不变的东西。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Clutched in his hands — no, fused with his fingers — is a black cube of unnaturally smooth black material. In the endless cycle of excruciating metamorphoses, it is the only object that is unmoving and unchanging.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}一个材质异常光滑的黑色立方体正被他紧握在手中，不，是和手指熔在了一起。在那无尽而极度痛苦的变异轮回中，这是唯一静止不变的东西。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Il serre entre ses mains un cube noir, fait d'un matériau trop lisse pour être naturel, qui a fusionné avec ses doigts. Dans ce cycle infini de métamorphoses insoutenables, c'est la seule chose qui reste immobile et immuable.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Clutched in his hands — no, fused with his fingers — is a black cube of unnaturally smooth black material. In the endless cycle of excruciating metamorphoses, it is the only object that is unmoving and unchanging.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Il serre entre ses mains un cube noir, fait d'un matériau trop lisse pour être naturel, qui a fusionné avec ses doigts. Dans ce cycle infini de métamorphoses insoutenables, c'est la seule chose qui reste immobile et immuable.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ellerinde sıkıca tuttuğu... Hayır. Parmaklarıyla kaynaşmış, doğaüstü derecede pürüzsüz, siyah bir malzemeden yapılmış kara bir küp var. Izdırap verici başkalaşımların sonsuz döngüsünde hareketsiz ve değişmez kalan tek nesne o.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Clutched in his hands — no, fused with his fingers — is a black cube of unnaturally smooth black material. In the endless cycle of excruciating metamorphoses, it is the only object that is unmoving and unchanging.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ellerinde sıkıca tuttuğu... Hayır. Parmaklarıyla kaynaşmış, doğaüstü derecede pürüzsüz, siyah bir malzemeden yapılmış kara bir küp var. Izdırap verici başkalaşımların sonsuz döngüsünde hareketsiz ve değişmez kalan tek nesne o.{/n}

languages.text: {n}In seinen Händen — nein, mit seinen Fingern verschmolzen — ist ein schwarzer Würfel aus einem unnatürlich glatten Material. Im endlosen Zyklus qualvoller Metamorphosen ist sie das einzige Objekt das sich nicht bewegt oder verändert.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Clutched in his hands — no, fused with his fingers — is a black cube of unnaturally smooth black material. In the endless cycle of excruciating metamorphoses, it is the only object that is unmoving and unchanging.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}In seinen Händen — nein, mit seinen Fingern verschmolzen — ist ein schwarzer Würfel aus einem unnatürlich glatten Material. Im endlosen Zyklus qualvoller Metamorphosen ist sie das einzige Objekt das sich nicht bewegt oder verändert.{/n}

languages.text: {n}彼の両手に握られ――いや、その指と融合しているのは、不自然なほど滑らかな黒い素材でできた、黒い立方体だ。終わりなき苦悶の変容の連鎖の中で、それだけが唯一、動くことも変わることもない物体である。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Clutched in his hands — no, fused with his fingers — is a black cube of unnaturally smooth black material. In the endless cycle of excruciating metamorphoses, it is the only object that is unmoving and unchanging.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}彼の両手に握られ――いや、その指と融合しているのは、不自然なほど滑らかな黒い素材でできた、黒い立方体だ。終わりなき苦悶の変容の連鎖の中で、それだけが唯一、動くことも変わることもない物体である。{/n}
